title: From The Same (Pictures From Theocritus - From Idyl I.)
content:
Where were ye, nymphs, when Daphnis drooped with love?
    In fair Peneus' Tempe, or the grove
    Of Pindus! Nor your pastimes did ye keep,
    Where huge Anapus' torrent waters sweep;
    On �tna's height, ah! impotent to save,
    Nor yet where Akis winds his holy wave!
meaning:
"From The Same (Pictures From Theocritus - From Idyl I.)" is a quintessential example of William Lisle Bowles's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
